name: AI Capstone Project
description: A semester-long industry-sponsored or self-directed capstone project in which student teams design, build, and deploy a production-ready AI solution to a real-world problem. The capstone integrates skills from across the program.
tools: Tools are team-selected based on project requirements; previous semesters' tools are available
Typical stack includes Python, TensorFlow or PyTorch, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes or Cloud Run
Google Cloud Platform (GCP) ó Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Cloud Storage, BigQuery
Streamlit, Gradio, or Next.js (frontend, if applicable)

projects.name: Capstone Project: Industry AI Solution
projects.description:
Each team works on a unique project aligned with an industry partner's or self-defined challenge. Past capstone projects have included:

- **Real-Time Inventory Demand Forecasting**: Built a time-series forecasting system using LSTMs and deployed it on GCP Vertex AI with a Streamlit dashboard for supply chain managers. The model reduced forecast error (MAE) by 23% compared to the client's existing system.

- **Medical Image Screening Tool**: Developed a CNN-based screening classifier to flag potential anomalies in chest X-rays. Achieved 91% sensitivity with a custom U-Net segmentation overlay for radiologist review. Deployed as a HIPAA-aware REST API.

- **Multilingual Customer Support Chatbot**: Fine-tuned a multilingual LLM (mBERT) for intent classification across English, French, and Spanish. Built a RAG-powered knowledge base and integrated with a ticketing system. Reduced first-response time by 40% in pilot testing.

- **Predictive Maintenance System**: Used sensor data from manufacturing equipment to predict failures 48 hours in advance using an ensemble of gradient boosting and LSTM models. Deployed on Edge hardware with Docker for on-premises inference.

- **AI-Powered Resume Screener**: Built a fair and explainable resume ranking system using NLP and SHAP-based explanations. Included a bias audit (AIF360) and produced a model card documenting fairness metrics across demographic groups.

projects.name: Deliverables
projects.description:
- Working software system (deployed and demo-able)
- GitHub repository with documentation and CI/CD
- Technical report (15ñ20 pages)
- Poster and live presentation at the end-of-semester showcase
- Ethics and impact statement

prerequisites: Completion of all Semester 1 and Semester 2 courses (excluding AIDI-2005 itself)
raw_content:
## Overview
The capstone is the culminating experience of the AIDI program. Working in teams of three to four, students partner with an industry sponsor or propose their own project to solve a genuine business problem using AI. Teams follow an agile development process over 14 weeks, delivering a working system, a technical report, and a public presentation.

## Tools & Technologies
- Tools are team-selected based on project requirements; previous semesters' tools are available
- Typical stack includes Python, TensorFlow or PyTorch, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes or Cloud Run
- GitHub (version control and project management)
- Google Cloud Platform (GCP) ó Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Cloud Storage, BigQuery
- MLflow or Weights & Biases (experiment tracking)
- Streamlit, Gradio, or Next.js (frontend, if applicable)
- Slack / Notion (team communication and documentation)

## Topics
- Project scoping and requirements gathering
- Agile/Scrum for AI projects
- Data collection, labelling, and governance
- Model selection and architecture design
- Production deployment and DevOps
- Stakeholder communication and demos
- Technical writing and documentation
- Ethical review of the solution

## Projects & Capstone

### Capstone Project: Industry AI Solution
Each team works on a unique project aligned with an industry partner's or self-defined challenge. Past capstone projects have included:

- **Real-Time Inventory Demand Forecasting**: Built a time-series forecasting system using LSTMs and deployed it on GCP Vertex AI with a Streamlit dashboard for supply chain managers. The model reduced forecast error (MAE) by 23% compared to the client's existing system.

- **Medical Image Screening Tool**: Developed a CNN-based screening classifier to flag potential anomalies in chest X-rays. Achieved 91% sensitivity with a custom U-Net segmentation overlay for radiologist review. Deployed as a HIPAA-aware REST API.

- **Multilingual Customer Support Chatbot**: Fine-tuned a multilingual LLM (mBERT) for intent classification across English, French, and Spanish. Built a RAG-powered knowledge base and integrated with a ticketing system. Reduced first-response time by 40% in pilot testing.

- **Predictive Maintenance System**: Used sensor data from manufacturing equipment to predict failures 48 hours in advance using an ensemble of gradient boosting and LSTM models. Deployed on Edge hardware with Docker for on-premises inference.

- **AI-Powered Resume Screener**: Built a fair and explainable resume ranking system using NLP and SHAP-based explanations. Included a bias audit (AIF360) and produced a model card documenting fairness metrics across demographic groups.

### Deliverables
- Working software system (deployed and demo-able)
- GitHub repository with documentation and CI/CD
- Technical report (15ñ20 pages)
- Poster and live presentation at the end-of-semester showcase
- Ethics and impact statement

## Prerequisites
- Completion of all Semester 1 and Semester 2 courses (excluding AIDI-2005 itself)
